case_title: INTERNATIONAL MARINE FUELS GROUP, INC., DBA vs. AGHEDO, JOHN IND & DBA OSAS GAS & SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF INTERNATIONAL MARINE FUELS GROUP, INC., DBA SAN FRANCISCO PETROLEUM CO AS TO DEFENDANT AGHEDO, JOHN IND & DBA OSAS GAS & SERVICE DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          SEP-22-1993 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-26-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       SEP-02-1993

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-22-1993, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON SEP-22-1993, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JAN-19-1994, OFF CALENDAR
OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-22-1993, CONTINUED TO JAN-19-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT
